---
title: "CompBio_Feb"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

This is homework 3 

[Homework 3](Homework_3.html)
---------------------

[Homework 4](hw4html.html)
--------------------------

[Homework 5](hw5html.html)
--------------------------------

[Homework 6](hw6.html)
---------------------------


[Homework 5](<hw5html.qmd>)
--------------------------------
